title: Anthropic Considers Unusual Plan for Employee Stock Sales After It Goes Public
summary: As Anthropic prepares to go public, it is considering a highly unusual move to require rank-and-file employees to sell stock through rigid trading schedules so they don’t run afoul of insider trading laws, said a person familiar with the matter and a…
